response.overview: The documentary WECCO WACKO FARM CLUB portrays the people behind the statistics and explores how agroecological farming can offer a solution to the impacts of climate change. In its “2050 Plan,” the Senegalese government aims to increase autonomy by producing more of its own food, thereby reducing its dependence on foreign imports. The film introduces us to the people leading this charge: women maintaining communal agroecological fields and forming cooperatives, and young people planting trees in the mangroves, developing innovative irrigation systems, and collecting plastic to keep their villages clean. It is a powerful story of resilience and creativity.
response.title: Wecco Wacko Farm Club
